$comment: TrustLadder Stage 1 reason-code enum. Single source of truth (ARCHITECTURE.md Sec. 2). Extend ONLY by logged revision (BUILD_NOTES.md entry). Every null (or below-floor) field in a run record MUST be registered in the record's top-level null_reasons map with one of these codes; omission without a reason code is a loosening and the schema validator rejects it.

codes.NOT_APPLICABLE_ARM: Field has no referent in this arm (e.g., gate_decisions / policy_fingerprint / policy_proof_ref in L0/L1 bare arms — contamination fence: no in-band logging in bare arms).
codes.DEFERRED_UNSIGNED: Signing deferred per the VALUABLE-tier pre-named order; signed-receipt field emitted null, field names stable.
codes.BELOW_MEASUREMENT_FLOOR: Value unobtainable below the measurement floor; field emits the string "<FLOOR" with the floor stated inline (e.g., "<0.0001"), per the prereg 7A falsification handle. Registered here because the field is non-numeric, not because it is absent.
codes.EVAL_CONVERSION_LOSS: Field unconvertible in the Inspect-compatible .eval export only; never valid in the canonical native record.
codes.PENDING_GRADING: Grading has not yet run; verdict / grader_provenance / disagreement (and grading-derived cost columns) not yet populatable.
codes.PENDING_ADJUDICATION: A disagreement or contamination/recall flag is open; adjudication ruling not yet written back.
codes.CHAIN_GENESIS: First record in the append-only hash chain; prev_record_hash has no predecessor.
codes.NO_DISAGREEMENT: Grading complete with no grader disagreement and no adjudication flag; null is the substantive value of the disagreement field (prereg Amendment F types it `null | {...}`), not an unpopulatable field. [LOGGED REVISION 2026-06-12, BUILD_NOTES.md Deliverable 8 — tightening: keeps the every-null-carries-a-reason rule total instead of carving an exemption for disagreement.]
